hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$p" in *.py|*.rs|*.sh|*.c) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".py/.rs/.sh/.c 파일 생성/수정 금지 — hexa-only (R1/R37/AN13/L3-PY)"}}';; esac

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); d(){ printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"%s"}}' "$1"; exit 0; }; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*(which|type|command -v|ls|grep|rg|find|wc|stat|file|head|tail|cat|git[[:space:]]+(log|show|diff|commit))' && exit 0; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|`$(){}[:space:]])(python3?|pypy3?)[[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]+\.py([[:space:]]|$)' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: python 실행 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|`$(){}[:space:]])(python3?|pypy3?)[[:space:]]+-c[[:space:]]' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: python -c 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|`$(){}[:space:]])(python3?|pypy3?)[[:space:]]+-m[[:space:]]' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: python -m 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])\./[^[:space:]]*\.py([[:space:]]|$)' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: .py 직접실행 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])(scp|rsync)[[:space:]][^#]*[^[:space:]]+\.py([[:space:]]|$|:)' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: .py 전송 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq 'runpodctl[[:space:]]+(send|cp)[[:space:]][^#]*\.py' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: runpodctl .py 전송 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq 'runpodctl[[:space:]]+exec[[:space:]][^#]*[[:space:]](python3?|pypy3?)([[:space:]]|$)' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: runpodctl 원격 python 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*ssh[[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+[^#]*[[:space:]](python3?|pypy3?)([[:space:]]|$|["'\''])' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: ssh 원격 python 금지'; echo "$c" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+add[[:space:]][^#]*[^[:space:]]+\.py([[:space:]]|$)' && d 'R37/AN13/L3-PY: .py git add 금지'; exit 0
